article.p: MetaOWL uses file-based routing. The directory structure in pages/ directly maps to URL routes.

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Create pages in the src/pages/ directory:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: For static pages, create a folder with an Index.js file:

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Use square brackets to create dynamic route parameters:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
pre.code:
import { router } from 'metaowl'
router.push('/about') router.replace('/login') router.back()
